description: Case style: Analog watch with a rectangular stainless steel case Dial style: Black dial with silver hands Strap style: Black textured leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and bottom left on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and analog watches)
